heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 152907 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
text: The corporation has the exclusive right to use the name “National Society, Daughters of the American Colonists” and seals, emblems, and badges the corporation adopts. This section does not affect any vested rights.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15290736:2909., , .Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–561, § 998 Stat. 2911The words “established or”, “sole and”, “to have and”, “in carrying out its purposes”, and “or used” are omitted as unnecessary.
